title: Hard Floor Protector, Absorbent Dust Sheet Floor Fleece | Roll of 1M X 25M | Easy Installation | Anti-Slip & Reusable | Trio Plus
features: ABSORBENT FLOOR PROTECTION FLEECE: Our floor fleece is perfect for anybody who wants to protect a wooden or expensive hard floor surface against spills and mess. Protects wood, lino, tile and marble floors.
EASY APPLICATION: A fantastic 1 metre wide and 25 metre long absorbent floor protection which is quick and easy to lay and use. A roll of our floor protection fleece can cover most domestic rooms!

GREAT PROTECTOR FROM FLUIDS: Our dust sheets are polythene backed which prevents fluids penetrating protected floors. It effectively soaks up any spills, moisture, paint etc and even holds back dust! A much better solution than plastic, cardboard and dust-sheets!
ANTI-SLIP & REUSABLE: Safe to walk on, even when wet, helping to reduce accidents in the workplace! It is also reusable and supplied on a handy, portable roll.

20 YEARS ESTABLISHED- At Trioplus we have been supplying floor protection products around the world from UK, Milan to Dubai supplying for prestigious locations such as Buckingham palace, Royal Ascot and HM Tower of London so you are in good hands.
description: Product Description DUST Sheet ABSORBANT Floor Fleece 1M X 25M- Waterproof 300g/m² ur hard floor protection grey entry-level fleece is perfect for anybody on a budget, who wants to protect a wooden or tiled floor against spills and the mess that DIY can cause. It is easy to apply, and can be left in place for up to five weeks. At a meter wide and 25mt long, a roll of our floor protection fleece can cover most domestic rooms. Please see our other listings if you require a self-adhesive fleece listing. PROTECT FROM IMPACT, DIRT & damp; LIQUID PENETRATION - much better solution than plastic, cardboard, dustsheets etc! FELT TOPSIDE - effectively soaks up any spills, moisture, paint etc and absorbs them like a sponge. Even holds back dust! POLYTHENE BACKED - prevents any fluids penetrating the protected hard floor underneath ANTI-SLIP - safe to walk on, even when wet, helping to reduce accidents in the workplace! RE-USABLE - saving you money! SUPPLIED ON A HANDY, PORTABLE ROLL - quick and easy to lay and reposition. INEXPENSIVE - compared to costly repair or replacement of damaged hard floors. PRODUCED FROM NATURAL RECYCLED MATERIALS SUITS ALL HARD FLOORS - making this product extremely versatile - wood, vinyl, natural stone, tiles etc etc! WELL ESTABLISHED PRODUCT - use what the professionals use - as used by all the leading UK removal companies, as well as BBC, Channel 4 & ITV! Premium floor protection Excellent protection for wood, lino, tile, marble floors 1 metre wide and 25 metres long. Easy to apply, can be left up to 5 weeks. Polythene backed - prevents fluids penetrating protected floors Anti Slip - safe to walk on, even when wet Felt Topside - absorbs spills and moisture
